---
name: consultation-must-be-load-bearing
description: "Doctrine promotion must bind consultation, not advertise it."
metadata:
  node_type: memory
  type: project
---

Consultation of continuity at the entrypoint must be load-bearing. A doctrine that names a recognition rule without a mechanism that forces fresh sessions to read it is not actually doctrine — it is decoration. The hook is required; recognition without instantiation is hope-as-scheduling-system.

The local stub is mandatory: each project that imports a global rule must wire it into the project's entrypoint so the rule fires whether or not the operator remembers to ask. The wiring is the rule; the documentation is a comment on the wiring.
